creator: w.schwarzenfeld@utanet.at
text:
pyqt.mk )462214) shows:

    229 CONFIGURE_ARGS+=-b ${PREFIX}/bin \
    230                 -d ${PYTHONPREFIX_SITELIBDIR} \
    231                 -q ${QMAKE} \
    232                 --confirm-license \
    233                 --sip ${LOCALBASE}/bin/sip-${PYTHON_VER} \
    234                 --sipdir ${SIPDIR}

It is done, so I close here - fixed.
